data.title: Chicken Salad Chick offers free scoop of Classic Carol on Guest Appreciation Day Jan 22, thanking guests nationwide.
data.description: A popular fast-casual chain is expressing gratitude to customers across the country by offering a free scoop of their popular Classic Carol dish on January 22nd. Chicken Salad Chick, known as the sole fast-casual restaurant specializing in chicken salad, is hosting its yearly Guest Appreciation Day event.

data.title: "Biohaven showcases progress with degrader programs at J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference, reports positive early patient data."
data.description: Early clinical data from the first and only clinically validated extracellular protein degraders have shown positive results, utilizing Biohaven's proprietary MoDE™ technology and Yale University's licensed next-generation TRAP™ degraders. In the initial clinical trials involving patients, this novel approach has demonstrated promising outcomes.

data.title: Paramount escalates tensions to acquire Warner Bros. Discovery, sparking board fight in latest move.
data.description: Paramount's recent announcement marks another step in their ongoing pursuit to acquire Warner Bros, showcasing their growing determination in the industry.

data.title: TESSAN's universal travel adapter series wins "Best of CES 2026" award, impressing global tech community.
data.description: After an impressive showcase at CES 2026 in Las Vegas, TESSAN's Universal Travel Adapter Series has been recognized as the "Best of CES 2026." The tech community responded positively to the series, with enthusiastic media coverage and praise. This acknowledgment highlights the success of TESSAN's brand vision. The event, which took place on January 12, 2026, drew attention to the series' innovative features and versatility, cementing its position as a standout product in the global market.

data.title: Coinme appoints Hazen Baron as General Counsel to lead legal strategy as licensed and regulated stablecoin and crypto platform expands enterprise offerings.
data.description: In Seattle on January 12, 2026, Coinme, a prominent enterprise stablecoin and crypto payments platform, revealed the selection of a skilled Fintech Attorney to spearhead their legal strategy. This move comes as the company prepares to expand its enterprise offerings. This decision highlights the company's commitment to compliance and regulation as it continues to grow.

data.title: Report on tyre manufacturers' telematics activities in fleet management up to 2025 added to ResearchAndMarkets.com. Valuable insights for industry stakeholders.
data.description: The "Tyre Manufacturers Telematics Activities - 4th Edition" report is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. This report provides detailed insights into the initiatives of top tyre manufacturers in fleet telematics. It is a valuable resource for tyre manufacturers, telematics vendors, vehicle manufacturers, telecom operators, investors, consultants, and government agencies. The report offers comprehensive information on leading tyre manufacturers' activities in the fleet telematics sector. Interested parties can access this report for in-depth analysis and industry trends.

data.title: Agvance teams up with Razor Tracking to offer real-time fleet visibility for agribusiness, enhancing operational efficiency.
data.description: Agvance customers are now able to track the real-time location of vehicles equipped with Razor Tracking through their software, providing complete operational visibility. This new feature was announced in Fargo, North Dakota on January 12, 2026. With this update, customers can access live telematics data to monitor the whereabouts of their vehicles and equipment efficiently.

data.title: Health-E Commerce® and WEX, Inc. partnering to streamline tax-free Flexible Spending Accounts (FSAs) and Health Savings Accounts (HSAs) for consumers and employers for improved adoption and satisfaction. #FSA #HSA #Healthcare #Finance
data.description: Health-E Commerce®, the parent company of FSA Store® and HSA Store®, has partnered with WEX to enhance user experience for FSA/HSA users. This collaboration aims to boost adoption, utilization, and satisfaction of FSA/HSA accounts. The announcement was made on January 12, 2026, in Dallas. The collaboration is expected to streamline the user experience and drive increased engagement.

data.title: Wilson Elser promotes 41 attorneys to partnership in 2026, effective January 1, 2026, showing commitment to development.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, Wilson Elser, a national law firm, revealed the promotion of 41 attorneys to partnership status. This change became effective on January 1, 2026. The firm's decision to elevate this significant number of attorneys showcases their dedication to nurturing talent and fostering growth within the organization.

data.title: TÜV Rheinland offers recycled material verification process for electronics supply chains to enhance traceability.
data.description: TÜV Rheinland, based in Boxborough, Massachusetts, has recently announced the launch of a closed-loop recycled material verification process tailored for the TIC industry's extensive and intricate supply chains. This innovative system aims to enhance transparency and sustainability within the sector.

data.title: ECP and Sage collaborate for real-time visibility in senior living, benefiting 8,000 communities with faster responses.
data.description: In a recent development, a new integration has been established linking Sage's real-time alerting system with ECP's clinical documentation software. This integration aims to aid caregivers in providing quicker responses and ensuring more precise documentation of care. The announcement was made in Milwaukee on January 12, 2026, according to PRNewswire. ECP, renowned for being an all-encompassing software platform, is currently relied upon by over 8,000 senior living communities for their operational needs.

data.title: Jinal Jhaveri returns as CEO of SchoolMint, leading K-12 Enrollment solutions. Co-founder Bryan MacDonald steps down.
data.description: In Lafayette, Louisiana, SchoolMint, a prominent provider of Strategic Enrollment Management solutions for K-12 schools, declared that co-founder Jinal Jhaveri is now the Chief Executive Officer. Jhaveri takes over from Bryan MacDonald, the CEO for six years, who will stay connected to the company as an advisor and investor. SchoolMint was established in 2013 by Jhaveri and his spouse, Forum Desai, after encountering enrollment difficulties.
